title: Adult Census (5,000 rows)
subtitle: A real mixed-data SPN learned and then optimized offline on a random Adult Census subset.
about: This is a separate exported SPN model trained offline on 5,000 Adult Census rows using 8 selected mixed columns. The structure comes from learnSPN. After structure learning, its parameters were optimized for 20 autodiff steps (training cross-entropy 14.792 to 14.789). The browser loads only this static JSON model; no training or backend inference happens on the website.
